scale_rules.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl tracking-tight leading-none font-medium

layout_spacing.grid_system: Control Room Grid (grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-6) for Dashboard. Grid Borders style (visible grid lines) for tracking data.
layout_spacing.spacing_scale: Generous spacing (p-6, p-8) for Rites and Contemplative sections. Dense spacing (p-4, gap-4) for Meal Plans and Calendars.
layout_spacing.container_borders: All surfaced containers must have 1px border-zinc-800 to separate from the deep background.
layout_spacing.alignment: Left-aligned for all list/read heavy data. Optical alignment on buttons.

components_strategy.cards: Flat, 1px solid subtle border, no shadow, #18181b background. Hover states include a slight border color shift to zinc-600.
components_strategy.navigation: Crystal Glassmorphism: bg-black/60 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-white/10.
components_strategy.buttons: Primary: Solid #dc2626 with text-white, sharp corners or very slight radius (rounded-sm). Secondary: Transparent with 1px border-zinc-700 and text-zinc-300 hover:bg-zinc-800.
components_strategy.ai_tutor: The Tracing Beam component style. When the Vel'nar AI is actively listening/speaking, surround the microphone or interface with an animated gradient border (red/amber) and a blur-md glow.
components_strategy.data_display: Shadcn UI Tables and Lists but styled with the 'Grid Borders' micro-theme: border-collapse, exposed right and bottom borders for grid items.

motion_and_interaction.hover: Subtle border color shifts (zinc-800 -> zinc-600), explicit text color changes to prevent contrast loss.
motion_and_interaction.ai_pulse: Pulse animation for the voice recognition listening state using Tailwind animate-pulse combined with ring-4 ring-red-900/50.

accessibility.contrast: Text over backgrounds must meet APCA/WCAG AA standards. Heavy text-shadow on text overlapping images.
accessibility.motion: Respect prefers-reduced-motion for the AI tracing beam.
accessibility.test_ids: All interactive elements MUST have role-based kebab-case data-testid (e.g., 'velnar-mic-button', 'complete-rite-button').

hero_background.description: Blacksmith hammer on wood for the 'Forge' and sovereignty theme background

meditation_practice.description: Stone buddha statue with halo against dark background

warrior_practice.description: A man kneels with swords in a dramatic pose

rite_challenge_coin.placement: Rite of the Uncrowned completion screen (Challenge coin backdrop)

instructions_to_main_agent: Do NOT use 'Inter' for headings. Install and use Google Fonts: 'Cormorant Garamond' and 'Manrope'.
Implement WebLLM for the local Vel'nar AI tutor and integrate the Web Speech API for real-time pronunciation teaching.
The application is local and free, so use localStorage or IndexedDB for saving state (daily planner, meals, progression, calendar). No auth required.
For the daily planner, implement a checklist system specifically tracking 'Morning Sovereignty Declaration' and 'Evening Inventory'.
For the meal plan, include a calendar structure mapping 30 days of recipes.
The Rite of the Uncrowned section must walk the user through the rite and, upon completion, display a link to challengecoins4less.com to order the coin.
Use Phosphor Icons or Lucide React (lucide-react is preinstalled, use it).
Follow 'Grid Borders' style for tracking tables, ensuring borders are visible and structural.
Incorporate a 3D or visual pulse effect around the AI tutor microphone when listening (Tracing Beam concept).
Avoid fully rounded corners; stick to rounded-none or rounded-sm for the disciplined, brutalist aesthetic.
Always apply data-testid to critical buttons (calendar-date, start-practice, submit-speech, complete-rite).
